Synthetic prepared-bundle fixture for the IDML exporter golden test.

Mirrors the real bundle contract (index include order + page/*.rst in
prepared form, variables already substituted) at minimal size while
exercising every composition path of tools/export_idml.py main():
prose, safety twocol split, safety+symbols merge, fcc+inbox merge,
components, list/grid tables, lcdmode, and the data-page triggers.
